message: Jake
Cosner
Heh, I'm finally happy I get to interrogate you.
I'm glad, too. It's not often I'm called into places like this.
You can keep up the bravado while it lasts.
Look
Talk
Listen
System
The surroundings
About　the　suspect
About Veneta
About Eva
About Cindy
About Ginny
About the serial murder case
Save
Exit the game
Cut it out. I’m not here to teach you anything!
I'm sorry, too.
Oh, come on! Someone take this clueless idiot to the special room!
Wait, I can't go home yet?!
Listen, you’re a suspect. Keep that in mind!
The room feels cramped and stifling. No, it might be Cosner's intimidating presence making it that way.
I never imagined I’d find myself in a place like this.
He interacts with me confidently, like a fish back in water. This is his domain, and he sees himself as the king of this place.
I don’t think there’s any need to raise your voice in this cramped room.
Now, let's hear you confess everything you did.
Even if you say that, I have nothing to talk about since I haven't done anything.
You... even at this point, you're still
Mocking me?
Maybe it really was you from the start. Considering the parts that are missing, it feels that way.
I've said it a million times, I didn't do anything.
No way, I won't be fooled by such a lie. Left leg, both arms, both hands, lower abdomen, upper body.
Just the head left, huh?
I really didn't do anything.
No, you did it. I get it now, you intended to make mannequins out of the victims' bodies.
If you confess quickly, it'll be easier on you.
What exactly am I being accused of?
What are you pretending not to know now? Of course, it's for murder.
I don't remember doing anything like that.
I've thought you did it since the first time I met you.
For now, it's about Veneta Skakki, Eva Courtney, Cindy, and Annette Wheaton.
Your accusation is regarding the murder of these four.
Do I look like the kind of person who could do something like that?
You were a junkie. If you're still involved with drugs.
Heh, that's probably it, right?
Are you the type who can't get turned on unless you kill a woman during sex?
Who is Veneta?
Well, you wouldn't just kill people you know, right? Fine, I'll be kind and tell you.
Veneta Skakki is a streetwalker. She stands in the same spot every night and picks up clients.
Such professions are easy targets.
They're easy targets.
Isn't that right? You sure say it like it's not your problem.
You picked up Veneta and went into some cheap inn. Or maybe a warehouse. That's where you killed her, right?
I didn't do anything like that.
Tch, it's only a matter of time before you can't say that anymore.
If you just admit you did it, it would make things easier.
I'm curious, why did you only dismember Eva Courtney?
You should ask the culprit about that.
That's why I'm asking you.
Unfortunately, I'm not the culprit.
Hmph.
Oh, didn’t your mom teach you that lying is bad?
You killed her because Eva started digging into your past, right?
I’m innocent.
Did you dismember her out of pent-up hatred?
You're a scary guy too. You're a classic example of how people are not what they seem.
Poor Eva, being killed by such a nice-looking guy.
Cindy was so cute.
Why did you go and kill her?
I didn’t do it.
No way, you did it. Chopping off a left leg is a sick hobby. To top it off, you even sent the ankle to the agent.
Did you only give Cindy sleeping pills because you didn’t want to see her suffer?
Talking to you is pointless.
If you tell me what you did, I’ll actually listen.
Just admit it! I’m not here twiddling my thumbs!
Annette was a woman from the Escort Service, huh? Speaking of which, the owner of the company was caught.
Wait!? Gabriela got arrested?
Apparently, it's turning into a huge scandal involving politicians and big shots.
I hear Annette was a good woman. Rumor has it she was being kept by a celebrity, so the other side must have been quite something too?
I don't know about that.
You really have a knack for making people irritated.
Hurry up and confess! Then we can both be at ease.
That's what I want to know too. You copied the past incidents, didn’t you?
I have no idea what you’re talking about.
Where are you hiding the chopped-up stuff?
I can’t know that unless I ask the culprit.
That's exactly what I'm doing. Damn, you're such a stubborn guy.
N-no way.
You didn't eat the chopped-up stuff, did you?
I have no such hobbies.
Ugh, you disgusting perverted bastard! You’re definitely not going to heaven.
Ugh, no way.
Perverts deserve the death penalty.
※※※ It's a bug ※※※
